---
title: "Publication"
---

Verified publication details are not currently stored in this repository.

For the current verified publication profile, please see Li Tang's Google Scholar page:

[Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=3zkQ6d0AAAAJ){.custom-button}

<!-- TODO: Add verified publication citations, years, venues, DOI/PubMed links, and author lists when available. -->
